title: Oura debuts in India with Oura Ring 4 launch: Price, specs, health features and more
summary: Oura has launched the Oura Ring 4 in India, priced at ₹28,900 for basic models and ₹39,900 for premium variants. An Oura Membership is required for health insights, costing ₹599 monthly. The ring will be available starting March 18 via Amazon and Croma.

summary: Poco has unveiled the X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max, featuring MediaTek processors, IP68/IP69 ratings, and large batteries. Both models have AMOLED displays with 120Hz refresh rate, 50MP cameras, and run on latest HyperOS 3.&nbsp;

summary: Vivo has launched the T5x 5G in India with MediaTek chipset and a massive 7200mAh battery for under ₹20,000. It offers military-grade durability, water resistance, and various launch offers.

summary: Poco is launching its Poco X8 Pro series globally and in India today. Leaked prices suggest the X8 Pro will cost ₹33,999 for the 8GB model and ₹37,999 for 12GB. The X8 Pro Max is expected at ₹41,999 and ₹45,999 for its two variants.

summary: The AirPods Max 2 offer active noise cancellation that’s 1.5x more effective than the original model, which came out in late 2020, Apple said Monday in a statement.

title: Instagram is dropping end-to-end encryption soon: Here are 5 secure messaging apps you can use instead
summary: Meta will end end-to-end encryption on Instagram starting May 8, 2026. The company says users can still use WhatsApp for encrypted messaging while affected users will receive instructions to download their data before the feature is removed.

title: Microsoft unifies Copilot commercial and consumer product teams in unit rejig

title: Perfios appoints Nitin Chugh as the group CEO
summary: Perfios has appointed former State Bank of India deputy managing director Nitin Chugh as the firm’s new group CEO and managing director. Sabyasachi Goswami, who used to be the top executive will continue to lead the core business operations of the firm, the company said.

title: India parliament panel calls for tighter protection for gig workers
summary: A parliamentary panel has recommended mandatory registration for gig workers on a national database. Digital platforms must also contribute to their social security. This move aims to bring millions of app-based workers into formal systems. The panel wants clearer legal obligations for aggregators.
